Title: Senior Manager, Network Infrastructure
Description: Promoted to manage the employees of the Network, Data Center Facilities, and Telco teams. Responsible for the growth and maintenance of the IT infrastructure for our various Data Centers and remote offices. Teams are responsible for network routing, switching, firewall, security devices, phone systems, data center cooling, power, cable infrastructure, as well as WAN and Internet circuits throughout the world. One of two managers who run the CRB (Change Review Board) twice a week to manage changes occurring in our environment.

Title: Senior Network Engineer, Team Lead
Description: Promoted to manage the employees and be the technical lead of the Network Team. Responsible for managing and designing the growth of the network to accommodate the changing environment, including Cisco, F5, and Palo Alto equipment.   Managed the budget and purchasing for the department.  Designed and managed the network segment that carries the highly volatile stock quote multicast traffic.
